source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Measured display serif headings with exact interface sans text; Japanese guidance pairs Noto Sans JP for dense UI with a restrained Mincho-style display option for discovery narratives.
layout: Research-dashboard layout on an 8px grid with 8px card radius, tusk-line dividers, mottled texture panels, restrained shadows, and high-clarity data surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent narwhal motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image_gen on flat #00ff00 chroma key, followed by local alpha extraction with remove_chroma_key.py.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a single narwhal, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: accurate adult narwhal with streamlined arctic whale anatomy, one long straight spiral ivory tusk, grey mottled skin, subtle ivory highlights, pale ice-blue reflected tones along the underside, small flippers, natural tail flukes, and refined catalog-ready detail. The mood should suggest a precise discovery system: calm, exact, exploratory, and scientific without adding instruments or UI.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the tusk, tail, flippers, or body. Slight three-quarter side view so the tusk spiral and mottled body are visible.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural grey mottling, ivory tusk ridges, soft arctic highlights, and ice-blue undertones.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no ocean, no ice, no second animal, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Narwhal", derived from the visible isolated narwhal motif in this conversation.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the narwhal motif. The board must visibly respect grey mottled skin, ivory tusk spirals, ice-blue underside glow, arctic sea context, and precise scientific discovery mood.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable section labels, generous spacing, and a precise grid. Avoid dense tiny tables. Text must be clean and legible at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Narwhal", motif story "precise discovery system", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Palette labels to show: Ice Floe, Mottled Grey, Tusk Ivory, Arctic Blue, Deep Sound, Polar White, Slate Wake, Discovery Cyan.
Typography: include English guidance for a precise product UI and Japanese guidance with readable sample text such as "発見の精度" and "北極海の記録". Use multilingual font guidance that would work for research dashboards, data catalogs, and discovery tools.
Components: buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, popover, table, search command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard KPI cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty state, error state, loading state.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design-system board, realistic crisp UI mockup, quiet work-focused dashboard surface, 8px radius cards, restrained shadows, motif-derived speckle textures and tusk-line dividers.
Color palette: polar white and ice-floe background, soft grey surfaces, deep-sound text, arctic blue primary, ivory accent, discovery cyan signal, no unrelated saturated colors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic purple gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no dark-mode-only surface.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the "Morphous Narwhal" design-system board. It must feel like the same precise discovery system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible narwhal motif and the light-mode Morphous Narwhal board already in this conversation as references. Preserve palette roles, component language, tusk-line dividers, mottled skin texture rhythm, 8px radius, typography hierarchy, and research-dashboard UI coverage.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous spacing, and a precise grid. Avoid dense tiny token tables. Text must stay legible at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Narwhal", label "Dark Mode", motif story "precise discovery system", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Palette labels to show: Deep Sound, Polar Night, Arctic Blue, Discovery Cyan, Mottled Grey, Tusk Ivory, Ice Floe, Polar White.
Typography: include English guidance for a precise product UI and Japanese guidance with readable sample text such as "発見の精度" and "北極海の記録". Use multilingual font guidance for research dashboards, data catalogs, and discovery tools.
Components: buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, popover, table, search command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard KPI cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty state, error state, loading state.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep arctic sound and polar night colors, light text from polar white and tusk ivory, arctic-blue primary controls, discovery-cyan focus rings, mottled-grey muted surfaces, subtle ice-map and narwhal-speckle textures, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-compatible cards and controls.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext.
